description_long: This object is a traditional hand-cranked grinding wheel mounted on a sturdy wooden frame. The main feature is a large, circular gray stone wheel, held horizontally between two wooden supports. A black metal crank handle is attached to one side, allowing manual rotation of the wheel for sharpening tools. The frame is constructed from thick, brown wooden beams, with a flat wooden platform adjacent to the wheel, likely for resting tools or materials. The structure is supported by four robust wooden legs, ensuring stability during use. Metal brackets and fasteners reinforce the joints and secure the wheel in place.
description: A hand-cranked grinding wheel set in a robust wooden frame with a side platform and metal crank handle. The design features a large stone wheel and sturdy wooden supports.
description_view_0: Front view showing the stone wheel centered between wooden supports and the crank handle extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the circular stone wheel, the black crank handle, and the adjacent flat wooden platform.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden platform and the back of the stone wheel, with the crank handle visible on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the stone wheel, the supporting frame, and the platform on the left.
attribute_handle_type: single crank handle with right-angle bend
